title: selaginella versicolor
intro: Selaginella versicolor is a species of flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after being dried out. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella versicolor include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
